finland.title: Finland
finland.subtitle: Land of Auroras, Lakes, and Forests
finland.intro: Our home market. From Lapland's wilderness to the Lakeland forests, with hotel bookings, custom activities, and deep local experiences.
finland.hotelsDesc: From Lapland glass igloos to Helsinki design hotels, all price tiers covered. Long-term local partnerships secure scarce peak-season inventory at preferred rates.

hotelsItems.name: Kakslauttanen Arctic Resort
hotelsItems.desc: Watch the auroras from your bed in glass-domed igloos — among the world's top aurora hotels

hotelsItems.name: Arctic SnowHotel
hotelsItems.desc: Rebuilt every winter, with ice sauna and aurora ice suites

hotelsItems.name: Hotel St. George
hotelsItems.desc: New Nordic design, art collection, Michelin dining

hotelsItems.name: Punkaharju Hotel
hotelsItems.desc: Century-old lakeside lodge, sauna, canoe, forest

hotelsItems.name: Levi Hotel Spa
hotelsItems.desc: Slope-side ski resort with spa and family facilities

finland.activitiesDesc: Aurora viewing, ski instruction, sailing, photography sessions — every season delivers.

experiences.title: Aurora Hunting
experiences.desc: Rovaniemi/Inari professional aurora tours with real-time forecasting

experiences.desc: Turku archipelago/Helsinki summer sailing with skipper

experiences.title: Lakeland Retreats
experiences.desc: Cabin getaways with sauna, canoeing, foraging

experiences.title: Snowmobiling

routesItems.name: Molde

routesItems.name: Longyearbyen

activitiesItems.name: King Crab Safari

routesItems.name: Snæfellsnes Peninsula

routesItems.name: Faroe Islands

routesItems.name: Copenhagen
routesItems.desc: Fairytale city, birthplace of Nordic design and New Nordic cuisine

china.title: China
china.subtitle: Southern Anhui · Huizhou — A Thousand Years of Heritage
china.intro: Our China itineraries focus on southern Anhui — Huangshan, ancient Huizhou towns, Qiyun Mountain, and Jingchuan — with carefully crafted three-day programs including transport, 4-star accommodation, meals, attraction tickets, full guide service, and travel insurance.
china.anhuiToursSubtitle: Three-Day Tours · Huangshan · Huizhou · Qiyun · Jingchuan
china.anhuiToursIntro: Four classic three-day itineraries departing from Hefei, exploring the Huizhou region of southern Anhui in depth. Each tour includes a 38-seat air-conditioned coach, 2 nights at a 4-star hotel, 5 full meals, attraction tickets, accompanying & local guides, and travel insurance. Available for individuals or groups.

anhuiTours.title: Three-Day Tour of Huangshan
anhuiTours.tagline: After Huangshan, no other mountain is worth seeing
anhuiTours.summary: Huangshan Scenic Area + Chengkan ancient village + Tunxi Old Street + Xixinan Wetland — combining hiking and cable car for the iconic pines and sea of clouds.

items.name: Depart Hefei to Huangshan by coach
Chengkan ancient village
items.desc: Praised by Zhu Xi as 'the number one village in Jiangnan' — millennium-old Huizhou village with exquisite carvings, evening fish-lantern performance

items.name: National AAAAA Huangshan Scenic Area
items.desc: Coach to Yungu Temple, cable car or hike to Bai'e Ridge, Shixin Peak, Bright Summit, Yuping Tower — view the famous Huangshan pines

items.name: Tunxi Old Street by night
items.desc: Built in the Song Dynasty, best-preserved Song-Ming-Qing pedestrian street in China

items.name: Xixinan Wetland
items.desc: Surrounded by maple-poplar forest, streams and stone bridges — pastoral poetry in morning mist

anhuiTours.title: Three-Day Tour of Huizhou
anhuiTours.tagline: White walls, dark tiles, water under bridges
anhuiTours.summary: Tangyue Archways + Huizhou Ancient City + Xin'an River Gallery + Xixinan + Tunxi Old Street + Hongcun — Huizhou cultural deep-dive.

items.name: Tangyue Archway Group
items.desc: 'The Number One Village in Jiangnan' — seven ancient archways, ancestral halls, live filial-piety performances

items.name: Huizhou Ancient City
items.desc: Birthplace of Huizhou learning, three-carving art, ancient government office, evening fish-lantern parade

days.title: Xin'an River — Xixinan — Tunxi Old Street

items.name: Xin'an River Scenic Gallery boat tour
items.desc: 100-mile picturesque corridor, ancient Huizhou merchant route, riverside villages, millennial camphor trees

items.name: Xixinan Wetland
items.desc: Real-life Wizard of Oz — maple forest, streams, stone bridges, Jiangnan charm

items.name: Tunxi Old Street
items.desc: Best-preserved pedestrian commercial street in China, Song-Ming-Qing architecture

items.name: Hongcun ancient village
items.desc: 'The village in Chinese paintings' — unique ox-shaped water system, exquisite carvings at Chengzhi Hall — known as the 'Folk Palace Museum'

anhuiTours.title: Three-Day Trip to Qiyun Mountain
anhuiTours.tagline: Danxia landform · Taoist culture · No.1 mountain in Jiangnan
anhuiTours.summary: Huizhou Grand Canyon + Qiyun Mountain + Yuehua Street + Chengkan + Qiankou Residential Houses — landscape meets Taoism.

items.name: Huizhou Grand Canyon
items.desc: Cliff waterfalls, turquoise pools, ancient pines — optional thrilling rafting

items.name: Qiyun Mountain
items.desc: Danxia landform, Taoist heritage, 'No.1 mountain in Jiangnan', countless historic stone carvings

items.name: Bamboo rafting at Qiyun foothill
items.desc: Banks lined with millennial trees, graceful river scenery

items.name: Chengkan
items.desc: Naturally formed Bagua-pattern village, two national-treasure ancient buildings, Hui-style carvings

items.name: Qiankou Residential Houses
items.desc: 'For palaces go to Beijing; for residential houses come to Qiankou' — Ming-dynasty Hui-style ensemble

anhuiTours.title: Three-Day Tour of Southern Anhui & Jingchuan
anhuiTours.tagline: Li Bai's Peach Blossom Pond · Chinese Xuan paper culture
anhuiTours.summary: Peach Blossom Pond + Chaji ancient village + Moon Bay + Pingyuan secret realm + China Xuan Paper Culture Park.

days.title: Hefei — Jing County — Pingyuan — Moon Bay

items.name: Pingyuan secret realm
items.desc: 'Mini Li River of southern Anhui' — bamboo raft amongst rocks, Fengyang market team-building

items.name: Moon Bay Scenic Area
items.desc: 100-mile bamboo forest, classic film & TV location

items.name: Peach Blossom Pond (Taohuatan)
items.desc: Made famous by Li Bai's poem 'Farewell to Wang Lun' — emerald ripples, ancient riverbank trees

items.name: Chaji ancient village
items.desc: Small bridges and flowing water, Ming-Qing carved-beam buildings, ancient ancestral halls

items.name: Chinese Xuan Paper Culture Park
items.desc: National intangible heritage — handmade Xuan paper process, optional papermaking & rubbing experience

anhuiServiceItems: Accommodation: 2 nights at 4-star hotel (twin room, breakfast included)
Meals: 5 full meals (RMB 50 / person / meal standard)
Guide: Accompanying guide + local guide throughout
Insurance: Travel personal accident insurance, RMB 200,000 / person
Extras: 2 bottles of mineral water per person per day

cities.name: Xi'an
cities.desc: Silk Road origin — Terracotta Army, city walls

cities.name: Chengdu
cities.desc: Land of Plenty — pandas, Sichuan cuisine, slow life

cities.name: Hangzhou
cities.desc: West Lake, Longjing tea, Song-dynasty heritage

cities.name: Lijiang
cities.desc: Ancient town, Jade Dragon Snow Mountain

cities.name: Xiamen
cities.desc: Garden city by the sea, Gulangyu, Min culture

china.itinerariesIntro: Classic routes, fully customizable in days and city pairing.

itinerariesItems.name: Classic North · 8 days
itinerariesItems.desc: History + culture + modernity — the canonical first-time China trip

itinerariesItems.name: Western Frontier · 12 days
itinerariesItems.desc: Pandas, snow mountains, and Tibetan culture in depth

itinerariesItems.name: Silk Road · 14 days
itinerariesItems.route: Xi'an → Lanzhou → Jiayuguan → Dunhuang → Urumqi → Kashgar
itinerariesItems.desc: The ancient Silk Road, ultimate cultural depth

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About Finuo — A Travel Agency in Finland Bridging China and Northern Europe
about.intro: Finuo is a Helsinki-based travel agency in Finland, connecting China and Europe across Nordic travel, study-abroad consulting, and MICE event services. With 10+ years of Nordic depth and a trilingual team (Chinese / English / Finnish), we aim to be your most reliable Finland-based partner — whether you're planning an aurora trip, a custom itinerary across Norway, Iceland, and Denmark, applying to a Finnish university, or organizing a conference in Helsinki.
about.teamDesc: Local Chinese expats and Nordic specialists, fluent in cultural nuance and commercial logic.
about.partnersDesc: Long-term partnerships with Finnish universities, local governments, industry associations, and top resorts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in Touch
